name: Git & GitHub
goal: Use Git confidently for daily development work
units: Unit 1: Core Concepts - repo, commit, working tree, staging area
Unit 2: Essential Commands - init, add, commit, status, log
Unit 3: Branching - branch, checkout/switch, merge, conflicts
Unit 4: Remote Workflows - clone, push, pull, fetch, origin
Unit 5: GitHub - pull requests, forks, issues, code review
Unit 6: Undoing Changes - revert, reset, restore, stash
Unit 7: History and Inspection - diff, blame, bisect, reflog
